lines.speaker: Seaman Morris
lines.text: Hello there. Looking to travel somewhere? We can take you to Port Sarim or Musa Point. It only costs 30 coins.

lines.speaker: Seaman Morris
lines.text: Hello there. Do you want to travel somewhere? We can take you to Musa Point for 15 coins, or if you prefer, for 30 coins we can drop you off in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Seaman Morris
lines.text: Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to Musa Point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't want to go anywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or I could pay you nothing at all...

lines.speaker: Seaman Morris
lines.text: Nothing at all, you say? Yes, why not. Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to Musa Point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't want to go anywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where the ship to Kourend is?

lines.speaker: Seaman Morris
lines.text: Veos' ship? I think it's on the northern dock.
